original_abstract: This dataset was developed for Sub-Task 1 of the "Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation" track at Touché 2025. It consists of text segments curated from the MS MARCO V2.1 collection. To align with the goals of evaluating native advertising and information retrieval, the segments were retrieved using queries sourced from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 dataset.
humanized_abstract: Data created for Sub-Task 1 of the “Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation” task at Touché 2025. The dataset consists of samples of text taken from the well known MS MARCO V2.1 corpus. The samples were extracted based on the queries from the dataset Webis Generated Native Ads 2024. These samples were prepared to evaluate the performance of the approaches proposed to solve the task regarding the identification of native ads and evaluating the performance of information retrieval algorithms for this specific case.
